---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for the player card, Repo Squad, or exports
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What's the idea

A clear description of what you'd like to see.

## What problem does it solve / what does it make possible

Why this is worth building — a gap in the current experience, a joke/mechanic that's missing, an export nobody can
make yet, etc.

## How would it map to real GitHub data

Every mechanic in Transfergit maps to something real about a GitHub profile or repo (see "Project philosophy" in
[CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)) — what real signal would drive this feature?

## Rough scope (optional)

If you have a sense of it: which area does this touch — player card, Repo Squad, exports, home page, something
else? Roughly how big a change do you think it is?

## Alternatives considered (optional)

Any other way you thought about solving this, and why this approach seems better.
